name: Cyberpunk Edgerunners- RPG
description:
Cyberpunk Edgerunners RPG

Hey choom, welcome to Night City! Gangs, evil corporations, blinding neon lights. What more could a person want? In this neon- lit world you’ll have to navigate through the poverty ridden streets of Night City, encountering several new chooms along the way. Some may be willing to lend you a hand, while others will make it their life goal to tear you to the ground…the latter will probably be those corpo rats. But enough of my rambling! Why don’t you see for yourself why they call this metropolis ‘The City of Dreams’?!

Meet The Family!

Some other Choombas are here too!

Even Enemies As Well!

Notes: Hey guys, back with another RPG bot! I got one of my friends to watch Edgerunners and then I thought to myself “why not make an Edgerunners bot?”. Now here we are. I spent like 4 hours on this bot, so any followers or support would be freaky appreciated! I will be updating this bot in the future, such as adding specific locations like Corpo Plaza and Buck-a-Slice. Another important thing to note is that due to the high token count some thing might not be accurate, like character appearances and cyberware. If this is the case for you, it may be best to say their appearance yourself to help jog the bots memory. Anyways, I hope you enjoy this bot!

I recommend you use Deepseek AI with this bot, as it will enhance the experience quite a bit.

I will not be updating this bot anymore.
creator: MKstrikerz
